title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 24 September 2021
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 24 September 2021
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 24 September 2021
summary:
Main
The ship recycling market witnessed very limited activity this week as the owners and end buyers are both trying to ascertain the future
Source: Best Oasis Limited

owners and end buyers are both trying to ascertain the future price trends
